ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., LF1, LF2, LF3) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Polarity of the model (e.g., [-1.0, 0.0]) */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the model */,
  "overlaps" REAL /* Overlaps of the model */,
  "conflicts" REAL /* Conflicts of the model */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Number of correct predictions */,
  "incorrect" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect predictions */,
  "empirical_accuracy" REAL /* Empirical accuracy of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the evaluation process */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation version */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the evaluation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
